title: Fuel Talk
content:
I was talking to a friend about CRV's fuel consumption. I've collected the data for a while so my number is probably reflect a real world usage. So anyway, I share. :)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/06/crv_fuel_econ.png)

While we're at it, here is the Accord's number for comparison (one year).

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/06/accord_fuel_econ.png)

Quite impressive.
